rulings.Case Title: RONALD SVENDSGAARD et al VS. ASBESTOS DEFENDANTS (B/P)AS REFLECTED ON EXHIBITS et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION To Compel Further Responses To Written Discovery And Request For Sanctions; Proof Of Service
rulings.Rulings: On Asbestos Discovery Calendar for Tuesday, May 22, 2012 in Department 503 at 9:00 a.m., Line 1. Defendant National Steel and Shipbuilding Co.¿s motion to compel further responses to written discovery and request for sanctions: Hearing required. The hearing will be at 9:30am. Both sides must bring proposed orders to the hearing. A court reporter will not be provided by the court. If any party wishes to have the matter reported, the parties must meet and confer to agree on only one court reporter for any reported matter in this case. There will be only one official record in a case. The designated reporter must be licensed pursuant to Bus. & Prof. Code, Sec. 8016. If the parties are unable to agree on one reporter, the court will designate a qualified court reporter that will provide the official transcript for the matter. The party or parties shall pay for the cost of reporter. = (503/TLJ)

rulings.Case Title: RONALD KEELING VS. C.C. MOORE & CO. ENGINEERS
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion To Compel Further Responses To Written Discovery And Request For Sanctions
rulings.Rulings: On Asbestos Discovery Calendar for Tuesday, May 22, 2012 in Department 503 at 9:00 a.m., Line 4. Defendant Pneumo Abex, LLC¿s motion to compel further responses to written discovery and request for sanctions is continued on the court¿s own motion to June 14 so that the parties can further meet and confer. If all issues are not resolved before then, at the hearing the Court will only be making a ruling regarding the discovery listed in defendant¿s separate statements that plaintiff did not amend after defendant filed its motion. = (503/TLJ)
